{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032014593436D28556BAF563B0BE64"}"},"total":69},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612254930430739225","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很有新意，文笔流畅，故事情节紧凑。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772368472,"group_id":"7580024751628749886","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0R+BMX7rMlHF5Zg7BgzKqc=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b43ab2d5dd504df5a294a01e9d949009~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533875&x-signature=k3YTPo90oYgU2NM9BEEPPz8t7V4%3D","user_id":"6956733045","user_name":"芷若初见@"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6956733045","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7580024751628749886","book_info":{"abstract":"昔日龙国最强兵王，在边境任务中壮烈牺牲，再次睁眼，竟成了龙国首富那个人嫌狗厌的纨绔儿子王云腾。
而且开局就在逃跑路上！
前身受不了军训当了逃兵，结果一头撞进了武装毒贩的包围圈。
看着羸弱白嫩的手臂，王云腾无奈苦笑：“这身体连枪都端不稳啊……”
但兵魂不灭！
丛林中，他利用陷阱、泥巴、枯枝，化身幽灵猎手，将毒贩玩弄于股掌之间。
当巡逻队赶到，误将伪装的毒贩当良民，危机一触即发时——
满身是血的王云腾冲出草丛，一把夺过巡逻兵的步枪。
“砰砰！”
两枪，两个眉心红点，毒贩瞬间毙命！
巡逻兵大惊失色，下意识一枪托将王云腾砸晕：“抓住这个疯子！”
……
三天后，审讯室里。
